header_title.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwerekwa mu mutwe. Porogaramu yo guhishura uburyo bwo guteka bw'isi yose.

header_subtitle.text: Menya uburyo bwo guteka bw'isi yose
header_subtitle.description: Ubutumwa bwerekana hasi y'izina ry'uburyo mu mutwe.

home_page_hero_title.description: Umurongo mukuru ku rubuga rwa mbere mu gice c'umukiza.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Rondera uburyo bwo guteka bw'ukuri biva mu mashirahamwe y'isi yose
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Ubutumwa bwerekana munsi y'umurongo mukuru ku rubuga rwa mbere.

home_page_featured_title.description: Umurongo w'igice werekana hejuru y'urutonde rw'amakarata y'uburyo bwo guteka.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Ikarita y'igihe cyo guteka ku ikarata y'uburyo bwo guteka. {minutes} isimburwa n'umubare w'iminota.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Ikarita yerekana mbere y'urwego rw'ubworoherane ku ikarata y'uburyo bwo guteka.

recipe_card_easy.description: Ikarita y'urwego rw'ubworoherane yerekana uburyo bworoshye.

recipe_card_medium.description: Ikarita y'urwego rw'ubworoherane yerekana uburyo bufise ubworoherane hagati.

recipe_card_hard.description: Ikarita y'urwego rw'ubworoherane yerekana uburyo bugoye.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Isosi y'ibibabi vy'inka iryoshye ifise inyama zoroshye za chashu, iyaheze y'inyama y'agatogo, hamwe n'imisambi mishasha.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Ibisobanuro vy'uburyo bwo guteka Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Pizza Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan ya kera ifise utuyaga twa San Marzano, mozzarella nshasha, hamwe na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Ibisobanuro vy'uburyo bwo guteka Pizza Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos z'inka ziteguwe mu buryo butandukanye hamwe n'umuneke, cilantro, n'igitunguru ku mapapuro ya corn.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Ibisobanuro vy'uburyo bwo guteka Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Inkoko mu Vuta.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Inkoko zoroshye mu isosi y'utuyaga twa tomate n'ibinure vy'inka hamwe n'ibitonyanga vy'impumuro nziza.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Ibisobanuro vy'uburyo bwo guteka Inkoko mu Vuta.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Imisambi y'umuceri ishyushye hamwe n'udusu tw'ibikoko, tofu, ibinyomoro, hamwe n'isosi ya tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Ibisobanuro vy'uburyo bwo guteka Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Crepes z'Ubufaransa.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes zoroshye, zifise umwero w'ibinyomoro vya Nutella, imineke mishasha, hamwe n'akayunguruzo k'amavuta.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Ibisobanuro vy'uburyo bwo guteka Crepes z'Ubufaransa.

locale_switcher_label.description: Ikarita ishobora kugerwaho yerekana ururimi rwa dropdown mu mutwe.

locale_switcher_en.description: Amahitamwo y'ururimi rw'icongereza mu guhindura ururimi.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Amahitamwo y'ururimi rw'Ubuyapani mu guhindura ururimi.

locale_switcher_es.description: Amahitamwo y'ururimi rw'igisipanyoli mu guhindura ururimi.
